name: Offerpad Solutions Inc.
summary: PART I . Our Mission We are a real estate solutions company focused on giving homeowners more control, flexibility, and choice when buying and selling a home. Who We Are Founded in 2015, we combine proprietary technology with local real estate expertise to simplify the home sale process and reduce friction across the transaction lifecycle, helping customers move forward with speed, transparency, and confidence.
